critical_findings.title: Service role key bypasses ALL RLS — any API route compromise = full DB exposure
critical_findings.impact: Complete data breach: 30K creators' GMV, commission, referral data exposed. RLS is security theater.
critical_findings.fix_summary: Implement per-request auth checks. Use anon key for public, session tokens for authenticated. Audit all createServerClient() calls. Replace USING(true) with role-based RLS.

critical_findings.title: /api/kpi PUT endpoint has ZERO authentication — exposes aggregated business metrics
critical_findings.impact: Unauthenticated attacker retrieves total GMV, tier distribution, source breakdown. No audit trail.
critical_findings.fix_summary: Add auth check + admin role validation at top of PUT handler.

critical_findings.title: Singleton ReferralEngine shares Supabase client across requests in serverless
critical_findings.impact: Cross-request data leakage in warm containers. Auth state reuse between creators during peak hours.
critical_findings.fix_summary: Remove singletons. Use factory function: getReferralEngine() per request. Same for RecommendationEngine.

critical_findings.title: No transaction boundaries — partial failures corrupt referral, order, and content data
critical_findings.impact: Referral INSERT succeeds but uses_count not incremented. GMV incremented but order not tracked. 5-10% inconsistent records by month 12.
critical_findings.fix_summary: Wrap multi-step ops in PostgreSQL transactions via Supabase RPC. Create process_referral_signup_transaction().

critical_findings.title: No idempotency + cron overlap + no order dedup = GMV doubling on every retry
critical_findings.impact: Cron retry or overlap fires syncShopOrders twice → same orders processed twice → monthly_gmv doubles. $1M+ incorrect at scale.
critical_findings.fix_summary: Create order_tracking table with UNIQUE shop_order_id. Add cron_sync_state table. Stagger cron schedules. Check before processing.

high_findings.title: content_tracking missing updated_at column — sync-orchestrator upsert fails silently
high_findings.fix_summary: Add updated_at column + auto-update trigger to content_tracking.

high_findings.title: referral_codes/referrals missing updated_at — RPC increment_referral_code_uses fails
high_findings.fix_summary: Add updated_at column to both tables + auto-update trigger.

high_findings.title: /api/shipping POST update_status — no field validation, accepts invalid status and arbitrary fields
high_findings.fix_summary: Validate status against enum. Add pickPatchFields() whitelist. Add auth check.

high_findings.title: /api/join POST — public endpoint with no rate limiting, vulnerable to spam/DoS
high_findings.fix_summary: Implement per-IP rate limiting (5 req/hour). Add CAPTCHA or email verification.

high_findings.title: /api/kpi PUT — weak null handling on latestKpi.data, masks DB errors
high_findings.fix_summary: Add explicit error check for PGRST116. Handle null kpi properly. Add logging.

high_findings.title: KPI PUT fetches ALL 30K creators into memory — no limit, no materialized view
high_findings.fix_summary: Move aggregation to DB (RPC or materialized view). Add .limit(). Cache results.

high_findings.title: N+1 in referral status updates — 2,000 queries for 1,000 referrals
high_findings.fix_summary: Batch creator+content lookup with IN clause. Build Map for O(1) lookups.

high_findings.title: 3 schema files with no version tracking — migration chaos, no rollback path
high_findings.fix_summary: Create migrations/ dir with numbered files. Add schema_migrations tracking table.

high_findings.title: Adapter factory crashes on ANY missing env var — single point of failure for all sync
high_findings.fix_summary: Lazy factory pattern with conditional initialization. Only create adapters when needed.

high_findings.title: Cron timezone mismatch — UTC 3AM ≠ Korea 3AM, sync runs during peak hours
high_findings.location: vercel.json cron schedule vs code comments
high_findings.fix_summary: Fix schedule to '0 18 * * *' (UTC) = 3AM Korea. Add timezone comments.

medium_findings.title: TikTok Shop HMAC signing may be wrong
Apify token in URL query param (credential exposure)
Email notification sender leaks API key in logs
auto_update_tier trigger fires on every UPDATE
/api/sync middleware skips auth, relies on CRON_SECRET only
No caching for AI tips — regenerated every request
Zod only used in /api/join, other endpoints unvalidated
Schema ENUM vs TypeScript union no auto-sync

low_findings.title: Adapter factory creates unused discovery adapter

fix_priority_order: ARCH-004 (idempotency + order dedup — prevents $1M+ data corruption)
UNI-001 (RLS architecture — largest effort but prevents full DB exposure)
